collection_goal: Continuously collect and curate skills and tools that improve prior authorizations, clinical documentation, scheduling, billing readiness, and patient communication workflows.

buckets.label: Prior Authorization + CoverMyMeds Adjacent Workflow Tools

repos.description: Comprehensive n8n community node for the Waystar healthcare RCM platform. Enables end-to-end billing automation including eligibility (270/271), claims processing (837P/I/D), claim status (276/277), remittance (835/ERA), denial management, prior authorization, and analytics workflows.
ML Model for Predicting Auto-Approvals of Prior Authorization Requests
AI-powered prior authorization and appeals automation for healthcare

HelixFlow AI is an advanced administrative automation platform targeting the $400B+ healthcare administrative sector. By combining deep clinical NLP, multi-agent reasoning, knowledge graphs, and digital twin simulations, HelixFlow actively predicts denials, accelerates prior authorizations, and uncovers revenue leakage before it disrupts hospitals
Open-source SDK for healthcare AI: FHIR endpoints, EHR integration, and deployment tooling in Python 💫 🏥
Python ETL pipeline integrating FHIR-compliant EHR data with Salesforce Health Cloud via the HAPI FHIR API.
Health informatics platform - FHIR/HL7 integration, clinical data pipelines, EHR interoperability
Python-based mapping engine that transforms legacy hospital data into standardized HL7 FHIR R4 resources. Focused on healthcare data interoperability and EHR compatibility.

Advanced Clinical Decision Support System is a Python–Flask app that integrates AI with EHR (FHIR/HL7) for diagnosis, 5-level triage, and real-time patient assessment. With 90%+ accuracy, live analytics, and a modern dashboard, it demonstrates how AI enhances clinical decision-making.

Scribe AI is an AI-powered clinical documentation assistant that converts doctor–patient conversations into structured medical notes in real time. It automatically generates accurate summaries, reducing manual paperwork, saving time, and improving clinical efficiency.
AI-powered clinical documentation — turns doctor-patient conversations into structured medical reports using Qwen AI and Whisper

Automate clinical note-taking and triage by transcribing doctor–patient speech and detecting emergencies. Use generative AI (ASR + LLM) to produce concise medical summaries, suggest treatment plans, and immediately alert staff to red-flag symptoms (e.g. chest pain). This reduces documentation burden and speeds up emergency response.

MedScribe is a secure, multilingual, AI-powered ambient clinical documentation platform that converts real-time doctor–patient conversations into polished, structured medical notes, reducing physician burnout and improving clinical workflow efficiency.
MedScribe AI is a full-stack application that leverages OpenAI Whisper and NLP techniques to transform medical speech into structured, exportable clinical documentation.
Transparent and Robust Agent for medical coding, billing, and revenue cycle end-to-end automation system
ICD-10-CM Medical coding assistant: suggest codes from a clinical note with rationale highlights, negation handling, and billing-aware post-processing.
CrewAI-based medical coding and billing automation

This repository provides resources for healthcare professionals and students to enhance their knowledge of medical billing. It includes educational materials on coding systems, sample code for automation, workflow diagrams, and best practices for efficient billing processes. Contributions are welcome to improve this valuable resource!
A web-based healthcare platform where patients book appointments, doctors manage schedules and medical records, and admins oversee the entire system, with SMS reminders and analytics dashboards.
Medical appointment platform for clinics and therapy centers—Angular 19 + ASP.NET Core 9 Web API + TypeScript: online booking, patient profiles, availability, reminders, and admin scheduling.

A comprehensive web/mobile application designed to streamline healthcare scheduling. Features include real-time slot booking, patient/doctor dashboards, automated reminders, and secure medical record management to bridge the gap between patients and healthcare providers.
A role-based medical appointment system with admin, doctor, and patient dashboards, real-time scheduling, and automated reminders.

Medical Appointment No-Show Analysis | 110K+ Brazil healthcare records | 20% no-show rate diagnosed | Python EDA + Chi-Square validation | SMS reminders linked to 12% lower no-shows | Actionable scheduling recommendations

The Doxy Link Sender is a lightweight automation tool designed to streamline telehealth workflows by automatically sending secure  video visit links to patients via SMS. It pulls appointment data from a Google Sheet, matches patients to their scheduled provider , generates the correct Doxy link, and sends it out at the appropriate moment

agent_skill_backlog: Remember active source application until user changes it.
Parse patient selector in LastName, FirstName format and disambiguate with DOB/MRN when needed.
Extract demographic fields required for prior authorization workflows.
Extract diagnosis and ICD-10 data relevant to the medication request.
Map extracted values to target form fields with validation checks before submit.
Use human-like input pacing and section-by-section review in portal form entry.
Require explicit user confirmation before final healthcare submission actions.
watchlist_next_actions: Track high-signal tools with active maintenance and healthcare relevance.
Promote tools to implementation candidates only after manual review.
Prioritize workflows that reduce time to prior-auth submission and reduce charting burden.
